---
title: "Scripture Readings for Schools and Families. With Comments. Apostolic Times."
---

## Scripture Readings for Schools and Families. With Comments. Apostolic Times.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1879
**Genre:** Non-fiction: theology (Bible selections)
**Format:** Edited book

**Publisher:** London and New York: Macmillan and Co

### Notes

“Reading” about a page in small type. “Comment” slightly more in larger type.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
